creator: shitman71@hotmail.com
text:
The error is related to gtk, i think the firewall can cause this but iam not receiving any block-messages via firewall and an attempt to unblock it via firewall already failed.

No matter which wine-version is installed, all are giving exactly the same behaviour. Same thing to winetricks, i can user older versions or the newest version directly from the site, its not changing this behaviour in any way.

Iam using the newest version of freebsd with all upgrades, everything is perfectly updated and fine but its producing this error message.

The firewall way the only thing i could assume some causes but monitoring and changing settings didn't do anything, i don't know what to do.
